subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Praise be to God that ye are an assembly of reformation, and your purpose is the good in the pathway of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی الحمد لله که شما محفل اصلاحید و مقصدتان خیر است در سبیل جمال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
